'''matata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encephalalgia|encephalalgia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encephalalgia|encephalalgia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| matata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mætætæth|mætætæth]] || [[word:mætætæj|mætætæj]] || [[word:mætætæsh|mætætæsh]] || [[word:mætætæ|mætætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:matatatath|matatatath]] || [[word:matatataj|matatataj]] || [[word:matatatash|matatatash]] || [[word:matatata|matatata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:matatath|matatath]] || [[word:matataj|matataj]] || [[word:matatash|matatash]] || [[word:matata|matata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mataftath|mataftath]] || [[word:mataftaj|mataftaj]] || [[word:mataftash|mataftash]] || [[word:mataftaf|mataftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:matatatha|matatatha]] || [[word:matataja|matataja]] || [[word:matatasha|matatasha]] || [[word:matataka|matataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:matatath|matatath]] || [[word:matataj|matataj]] || [[word:matatash|matatash]] || [[word:matata|matata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:matatathal|matatathal]] || [[word:matatajal|matatajal]] || [[word:matatashal|matatashal]] || [[word:matatakal|matatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:matatathatha|matatathatha]] || [[word:matatajaja|matatajaja]] || [[word:matatashasha|matatashasha]] || [[word:matataka|matataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:matatathan|matatathan]] || [[word:matatajan|matatajan]] || [[word:matatashan|matatashan]] || [[word:matatakan|matatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:matatathaoro|matatathaoro]] || [[word:matatajaoro|matatajaoro]] || [[word:matatashaoro|matatashaoro]] || [[word:matatakaoro|matatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
